verses.text: Consider 'the Apostle and High Priest of our profession, Christ Jesus,' faithful to Him that appointed Him, as Moses was faithful. Greater than Moses. Fix your thoughts on the faithful Christ.
Consider 'the Apostle and High Priest of our profession, Christ Jesus,' faithful to Him that appointed Him, as Moses was faithful. Greater than Moses. Fix your thoughts on the faithful Christ.
Moses was faithful as a servant in the house, but Christ as 'a son over his own house,' worthy of more glory. Son over servant. The builder is greater than the house.

The Holy Ghost warns: 'To day if ye will hear his voice, harden not your hearts,' as Israel did in the wilderness, whom God barred from rest. A warning. Unbelief shuts men out of God's rest.

The Holy Ghost warns: 'To day if ye will hear his voice, harden not your hearts,' as Israel did in the wilderness, whom God barred from rest. A warning. Unbelief shuts men out of God's rest.
Beware of 'an evil heart of unbelief'; 'exhort one another daily,' lest any be hardened through sin's deceit. Watch and warn. Sin hardens by little; daily encouragement guards the heart.

Beware of 'an evil heart of unbelief'; 'exhort one another daily,' lest any be hardened through sin's deceit. Watch and warn. Sin hardens by little; daily encouragement guards the heart.
They could not enter in 'because of unbelief.' The promise was sure, the failure their own. Solemn end. It was not weakness but unbelief that lost them rest.
